description: Bar chart titled "Total Scope 1, 2 and 3 GHG emissions (million tonnes of CO2e)" showing annual emissions for 2021, 2022, and 2023 with Scope 1, Scope 2, and Scope 3 components, totals labeled 103.58*, 97.80*, and 87.54, in-scope values 93.29**, 88.42**, and 84.08, and excluded portions 1.44/3.38, 0.74/3.27, and 0.31/3.16. Includes a legend and a 2018 baseline annotation.
Donut chart summarizing 79.55** million tonnes and showing breakdown: 67% sourcing ingredients and finished goods, 5% manufacturing, 12% packaging, 7% logistics, 9% overheads and others.
Donut chart titled "Renewable electricity at our manufacturing sites at year end (%), with a target of 100% by 2025" showing 91.9% in 2023, with comparison values 78.4% in 2022 and 63.7% in 2021.
